name: Hox3_zen_bcd_duplication_remnant
description: Hox3 lineage duplication remnant inside ANT-C: zen, zen2 and bicoid (bcd) are all descendants of a single ancestral Hox3 gene via Diptera-lineage tandem duplications. zen and zen2 retain partial paralog identity (~70% protein), bcd has diverged extensively and lost its homeotic role to acquire morphogen function. ~5-15 kb spacing in ANT-C.
expected_copy_count: 3 tandem paralogs (zen, zen2, bcd) — drosophila-specific Hox3 expansion
